parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "inputs": {
    "lead_summary": "{{ $('Campos Resposta').first().json?.lead_summary || "" }}",
    "lead_status": "{{ $('Campos Resposta').item.json.lead_status }}",
    "last_intent": "{{ $('Campos Resposta').item.json.last_intent }}",
    "name": "{{ $('Dados Mensagem').first().json.sender_name }}",

    "system_event": "HORARIOS_ENVIADOS",

    "option_1_display": "{{ $json.option_1.display }}",
    "option_2_display": "{{ $json.option_2.display }}",

    "option_1_start": "{{ $json.option_1.starts_at }}",
    "option_2_start": "{{ $json.option_2.starts_at }}"
  },

  "query": "[SYSTEM_EVENT] HORARIOS_ENVIADOS | STATUS=AGUARDANDO_ESCOLHA_HORARIO | OPCOES=1) {{ $json.option_1.display }} | 2) {{ $json.option_2.display }}  | LEAD_DEVE_ESCOLHER_UMA_OPCAO",

  "response_mode": "streaming",

  {{ $('Campos Resposta').first().json.dify_uuid==""?""
  :'"conversation_id":' + '"' + $('Campos Resposta').first().json.dify_uuid + '",' }}

  "user": "{{ $('Dados Mensagem').first().json.phone }}"
}
